requirements.summary: Add Stripe payment processing integration to replace the current payment methods with automatic order confirmation upon successful payment
acceptanceCriteria: Stripe payment option is available on the payment page
Users can complete payment through Stripe's secure checkout
Orders are automatically confirmed after successful Stripe payment
Payment confirmation updates the order status in the backend

file_operations.description: Create a custom hook using useMutation from @tanstack/react-query that calls the backend's createStripeSession method. Use the stripe component to implement the checkout session hook. Parse the JSON result to extract the CheckoutSession with id and url properties. Validate that the parsed session includes a non-empty url before returning. Verify the stripe component's usage instructions before implementing.

Use the stripe component to create a PaymentSetup component. This component checks if Stripe is configured using isStripeConfigured backend method. If not configured, display an admin panel that prompts the admin to initialize Stripe with StripeConfiguration including secret key and allowed countries array. Only show this setup interface if Stripe has not been configured yet. Verify the stripe component's usage instructions before implementing.

Use the stripe component to create a PaymentSuccessPage component that displays a success message when payment is completed. Include navigation options to continue shopping or view orders. Verify the stripe component's usage instructions before implementing.

Use the stripe component to create a PaymentFailurePage component that displays an error message when payment fails or is cancelled. Include options to retry payment or return to cart. Verify the stripe component's usage instructions before implementing.

Register two new routes: path '/payment-success' pointing to PaymentSuccessPage and path '/payment-failure' pointing to PaymentFailurePage. Use @tanstack/router for route configuration. Ensure these routes are accessible without authentication guards since they are callback URLs from Stripe.

requirements.summary: Update the PaymentPage.tsx to include Stripe as a payment method option
acceptanceCriteria: Payment page displays Stripe payment option
UI clearly indicates secure payment processing

file_operations.description: Use the stripe component to integrate Stripe payment. Replace the existing Cash on Delivery and UPI payment methods with Stripe. Import and use the useStripeCheckout hook. When the user confirms payment, call the hook with shopping items converted to the ShoppingItem format (including productName, productDescription, currency, priceInCents, and quantity). On successful session creation, validate that session.url exists and is non-empty. If valid, redirect to the Stripe checkout page using window.location.href = session.url (do not use router navigation). If session.url is missing, display an error message and do not redirect. Show a loading state during checkout session creation. Display clear messaging that payment is processed securely through Stripe. Verify the stripe component's usage instructions before implementing.

Update the existing checkout mutation to support Stripe payments. Export a function or hook that converts cart items to the ShoppingItem array format required by the Stripe checkout session. Ensure the checkout flow integrates with the useStripeCheckout hook for Stripe-based payments.
